_metadata.title: Right to Explanation of Individual Decision-Making

primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex -- Official Journal of the European Union

upcoming: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for AI transparency and explainability (expected Q4 2026)

obligations.source_quote: Any affected person subject to a decision which is taken by the deployer on the basis of the output from a high-risk AI system listed in Annex III, with the exception of systems listed under point 2 thereof, and which produces legal effects or similarly significantly affects that person in a way that they consider to have an adverse impact on their health, safety or fundamental rights shall have the right to obtain from the deployer clear and meaningful explanations of the role of the AI system in the decision-making procedure and the main elements of the decision taken.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to Annex III high-risk systems (excluding point 2), producing legal effects or similarly significant effects with adverse impact

decomposed_atoms.description: Affected persons must have the right to obtain explanations
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL provide the right to obtain clear and meaningful explanations

decomposed_atoms.description: Explanation must cover the role of the AI system in the decision-making procedure
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL explain the role of the AI system in the decision-making procedure

decomposed_atoms.description: Explanation must cover the main elements of the decision taken
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL explain the main elements of the decision taken

decomposed_atoms.description: Explanations must be clear and meaningful to the affected person
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL ensure explanations are clear and meaningful

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for explainability interfaces, explanation generation code, SHAP/LIME integration, decision audit trails, user-facing explanation endpoints
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether explanations are truly clear and meaningful to affected persons

obligations.source_quote: Paragraph 1 shall not apply to the use of AI systems for which exceptions from, or restrictions to, the obligation under that paragraph follow from Union or national law in compliance with Union law.

decomposed_atoms.description: Right to explanation does not apply where Union or national law provides exceptions
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Exception applies where Union or national law provides for exceptions to the right to explanation

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for legal analysis documenting applicable Union or national law exceptions
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Legal assessment of whether an exception under Union or national law applies

obligations.source_quote: This Article shall apply only to the extent that the right referred to in paragraph 1 is not otherwise provided for under Union law.

decomposed_atoms.description: Art. 86 only applies if the right to explanation is not otherwise provided under Union law
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL NOT apply where the right to explanation is already provided under Union law

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for legal analysis of whether other Union law already provides equivalent right to explanation (e.g. GDPR Art. 22)
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Legal assessment of whether other Union law provisions already cover the right to explanation
